# AIDA: Analysis of Interval DAta

## Overview

**AIDA** provides tools for the analysis of interval-valued data,
including construction, visualization, robust estimation, and outlier
detection. The package is built around the `intData` class and is
designed to support methodological research and applied workflows
involving interval-valued data.

AIDA currently includes functionality for:

- Construction of interval-valued datasets
- Interval-valued covariance estimation
- Interval Minimum Covariance Determinant (IMCD) estimator
- Robust squared Interval-Mahalanobis distance
- Outlier detection based on robust distances
- Visualization tools for interval data

## Installation

You can install the development version from GitHub:

``` r
# install.packages("remotes")
remotes::install_github("catarinaploureiro/AIDA")
```

## Minimal Example

``` r
library(AIDA)

# Create an intData object from the iris dataset, using the Species column as 
# grouping variable. We also specify the latent distribution as "General" to 
# estimate the parameters based on the microdata.
data(iris)
iris_int <- micro2intData(iris[,1:4], iris$Species, LatentCase = "General")

# Check the parameters of the latent distribution
iris_int@LatentParam
#> [[1]]
#>           [,1]      [,2]      [,3]      [,4]
#> [1,] 0.1835903 0.1554921 0.1660354 0.1990067
#> [2,] 0.1554921 0.1381013 0.1461729 0.1683492
#> [3,] 0.1660354 0.1461729 0.1627440 0.1828199
#> [4,] 0.1990067 0.1683492 0.1828199 0.2704900
#> 
#> [[2]]
#>            [,1]       [,2]       [,3]       [,4]
#> [1,] 0.01851852 0.00000000 0.00000000  0.0000000
#> [2,] 0.00000000 0.04199507 0.00000000  0.0000000
#> [3,] 0.00000000 0.00000000 0.02913753  0.0000000
#> [4,] 0.00000000 0.00000000 0.00000000 -0.1802821

# Compute the classical covariance and correlation matrices
iris_cov <- int_cov(iris_int)
iris_corr <- cov2cor(iris_cov)

# Pairs plot, the lower triangular shows scatter plots of the four variables, 
# while the upper triangular shows the interval correlation matrix.
SYMB.pairs.panels(iris_int, corr = iris_corr, labels = colnames(iris_int))
```

![](README_files/figure-gfm/unnamed-chunk-2-1.png)

## Vignettes

For a full introduction about the `intData` class, see:

``` r
vignette("intData_examples", package = "AIDA")
```

For examples on the IMCD estimator and outlier detection based on the
robust squared Interval-Mahalanobis distance, see:

``` r
vignette("IMCD_examples", package = "AIDA")
```

# Package index

## All functions

- [`Centers()`](https://catarinaploureiro.github.io/AIDA/reference/Centers.md)
  : Centers Method for intData
- [`IMCD()`](https://catarinaploureiro.github.io/AIDA/reference/IMCD.md)
  : Interval-valued data Minimum Covariance Determinant (IMCD)
  estimation
- [`IMah_dist()`](https://catarinaploureiro.github.io/AIDA/reference/IMah_dist.md)
  : Interval-Mahalanobis Distance
- [`IMah_dist_pairs()`](https://catarinaploureiro.github.io/AIDA/reference/IMah_dist_pairs.md)
  : Interval-Mahalanobis distance for all pairs
- [`KL_divergence()`](https://catarinaploureiro.github.io/AIDA/reference/KL_divergence.md)
  : Kullback-Leibler (KL) Divergence
- [`LatentCase()`](https://catarinaploureiro.github.io/AIDA/reference/LatentCase.md)
  : Latent Case Method for intData
- [`LatentDist()`](https://catarinaploureiro.github.io/AIDA/reference/LatentDist.md)
  : Latent Distribution Method for intData
- [`LatentParam()`](https://catarinaploureiro.github.io/AIDA/reference/LatentParam.md)
  : Latent Parameters Method for intData
- [`LogRanges()`](https://catarinaploureiro.github.io/AIDA/reference/LogRanges.md)
  : LogRanges Method for intData
- [`LowerBounds()`](https://catarinaploureiro.github.io/AIDA/reference/LowerBounds.md)
  : Lower Bounds Method for intData
- [`Mallows_dist()`](https://catarinaploureiro.github.io/AIDA/reference/Mallows_dist.md)
  : Mallows Distance
- [`NbMicroUnits()`](https://catarinaploureiro.github.io/AIDA/reference/NbMicroUnits.md)
  : Number of Micro Units Method for intData
- [`Ranges()`](https://catarinaploureiro.github.io/AIDA/reference/Ranges.md)
  : Ranges Method for intData
- [`` `[`( ``*`<intData>`*`)`](https://catarinaploureiro.github.io/AIDA/reference/S4-Extract-methods.md)
  : Subset an intData Object
- [`SYMB.biplot()`](https://catarinaploureiro.github.io/AIDA/reference/SYMB.biplot.md)
  : Symbolic Biplot for Interval-valued Data
- [`SYMB.pairs.panels()`](https://catarinaploureiro.github.io/AIDA/reference/SYMB.pairs.panels.md)
  : Pairs-plot for Interval-valued Symbolic data.
- [`UpperBounds()`](https://catarinaploureiro.github.io/AIDA/reference/UpperBounds.md)
  : Upper Bounds Method for intData
- [`angle_error()`](https://catarinaploureiro.github.io/AIDA/reference/angle_error.md)
  : Angle Error
- [`colnames(`*`<intData>`*`)`](https://catarinaploureiro.github.io/AIDA/reference/colnames.md)
  : Column Names Method for intData
- [`` `==`( ``*`<intData>`*`,`*`<intData>`*`)`](https://catarinaploureiro.github.io/AIDA/reference/comparison-methods.md)
  [`` `!=`( ``*`<intData>`*`,`*`<intData>`*`)`](https://catarinaploureiro.github.io/AIDA/reference/comparison-methods.md)
  : Equality Comparison for intData Objects
- [`creditcard`](https://catarinaploureiro.github.io/AIDA/reference/creditcard.md)
  : Credit Card Dataset
- [`dim(`*`<intData>`*`)`](https://catarinaploureiro.github.io/AIDA/reference/dim.md)
  : Dimensions Method for intData
- [`entrecampos_air_quality`](https://catarinaploureiro.github.io/AIDA/reference/entrecampos_air_quality.md)
  : Entrecampos Air Quality Dataset
- [`farness()`](https://catarinaploureiro.github.io/AIDA/reference/farness.md)
  : Farness Estimation
- [`frobenius_error()`](https://catarinaploureiro.github.io/AIDA/reference/frobenius_error.md)
  : Relative Frobenius Error
- [`get_latent_param()`](https://catarinaploureiro.github.io/AIDA/reference/get_latent_param.md)
  : Compute Latent Variables Parameters
- [`get_latent_var()`](https://catarinaploureiro.github.io/AIDA/reference/get_latent_var.md)
  : Compute Latent Variables
- [`head(`*`<intData>`*`)`](https://catarinaploureiro.github.io/AIDA/reference/head.md)
  : Head Method for intData
- [`intCars`](https://catarinaploureiro.github.io/AIDA/reference/intCars.md)
  : Cars Dataset
- [`intData-class`](https://catarinaploureiro.github.io/AIDA/reference/intData-class.md)
  : Interval Data Class
- [`intData()`](https://catarinaploureiro.github.io/AIDA/reference/intData.md)
  : Interval Data Constructor
- [`int_cov()`](https://catarinaploureiro.github.io/AIDA/reference/int_cov.md)
  : Interval-valued Covariance
- [`int_cov_z()`](https://catarinaploureiro.github.io/AIDA/reference/int_cov_z.md)
  : Sample Interval-valued Covariance
- [`int_mean_z()`](https://catarinaploureiro.github.io/AIDA/reference/int_mean_z.md)
  : Sample Mean
- [`int_outliers()`](https://catarinaploureiro.github.io/AIDA/reference/int_outliers.md)
  : Outlier Detection for Interval-Valued Data Based on Robust Distances
- [`micro2intData()`](https://catarinaploureiro.github.io/AIDA/reference/micro2intData.md)
  : Aggregate Microdata into Interval-Valued Data
- [`names(`*`<intData>`*`)`](https://catarinaploureiro.github.io/AIDA/reference/names.md)
  : Variable Names Method for intData
- [`ncol(`*`<intData>`*`)`](https://catarinaploureiro.github.io/AIDA/reference/ncol.md)
  : Number of Columns Method for intData
- [`nrow(`*`<intData>`*`)`](https://catarinaploureiro.github.io/AIDA/reference/nrow.md)
  : Number of Rows Method for intData
- [`plot(`*`<intData>`*`,`*`<intData>`*`)`](https://catarinaploureiro.github.io/AIDA/reference/plot.md)
  [`plot(`*`<intData>`*`,`*`<missing>`*`)`](https://catarinaploureiro.github.io/AIDA/reference/plot.md)
  : Plot Method for Two intData Objects
- [`plot_dist_dist()`](https://catarinaploureiro.github.io/AIDA/reference/plot_dist_dist.md)
  : Distance-Distance plot for interval-valued data.
- [`plot_interval_dist()`](https://catarinaploureiro.github.io/AIDA/reference/plot_interval_dist.md)
  : Interval-Mahalanobis distance plot for interval-valued data.
- [`print(`*`<summaryintData>`*`)`](https://catarinaploureiro.github.io/AIDA/reference/print.md)
  : Print Method for Summary intData
- [`row.names(`*`<intData>`*`)`](https://catarinaploureiro.github.io/AIDA/reference/row.names.md)
  : Row.Names Method for intData
- [`rownames(`*`<intData>`*`)`](https://catarinaploureiro.github.io/AIDA/reference/rownames.md)
  : Row Names Method for intData
- [`show(`*`<intData>`*`)`](https://catarinaploureiro.github.io/AIDA/reference/show.md)
  [`show(`*`<summaryintData>`*`)`](https://catarinaploureiro.github.io/AIDA/reference/show.md)
  : Show Method for intData
- [`spotify_tracks`](https://catarinaploureiro.github.io/AIDA/reference/spotify_tracks.md)
  : Spotify Tracks Dataset
- [`summary(`*`<intData>`*`)`](https://catarinaploureiro.github.io/AIDA/reference/summary.md)
  : Summary Method for intData
- [`summaryintData-class`](https://catarinaploureiro.github.io/AIDA/reference/summaryintData-class.md)
  : Summary Interval Data Class
- [`tail(`*`<intData>`*`)`](https://catarinaploureiro.github.io/AIDA/reference/tail.md)
  : Tail Method for intData
